result.finding: Application uses 3 Spring profiles (default, docker, test) with separate application-{profile}.properties files. The 'docker' profile is activated via SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=docker in docker-compose.yml. The 'test' profile uses H2 in-memory DB. No @Profile-annotated beans found.
evidence: application.properties — default profile: Oracle DB at oracle-db:1521/FREEPDB1, DEBUG logging
application-docker.properties — docker profile: Oracle DB at oracle-db:1521:XE, INFO/WARN logging (optimized for production-like Docker)
application-test.properties — test profile: H2 in-memory DB (jdbc:h2:mem:testdb), create-drop DDL, SQL logging disabled
docker-compose.yml: SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=docker activates docker profile in container
No @Profile annotations found in Java source code
No Maven profiles defined in pom.xml
values: Profile activation: SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE env var (docker) or test classpath override (test)
Key differences: database URL, logging levels, DDL strategy, test uses H2 vs Oracle
